titleStmt.title: SII 26.243Z: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 243. (A.R. No. 231 of 1909.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . viracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu karaivaḻi nāṭṭuc coḻamātevi nallūr Āḷuṭaiyār kulaicekaraīcuvaramuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūr maṉṟāṭi pūcakar Accan paṟaimaṉāṉaRead as paṟaiyaṉāṉa •
cūttilarāyanāṉa poyyāta tamiḻaṉ nam pakkal vantu viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku Amutu paṭikkum Āṭkoṇṭa nāyakaṟkum nācciyāṟkum Amutupaṭikkum palapaṭi nimantattukkum nam cākkile Irupatteḻu kaḻañcu ponvaittu viṭuvitta talaivayal maḷaṉaṟai Irukalaṉe patakkum Ellaiyāvatu peruvatikkum peruvāykkālukku
vaṭakkum kiḻakkum Orukkalaṅkuṟaip peruṅkavarukku teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitaiyil viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku Irutūṇiyum Amutupaṭiyāy vaḻinaṭaiccelvatākac caṭṭi Oṉ
ṟum Āḻaṭkoṇṭa nāyakaṟkum nācciyāṟkum vitaikalamum Amutupaṭiyāy vaḻinaṭai celvitāka caṭṭiyonThere is a letter above the line.ṟum tirukkaṇokki ceṅkaḻuniroTai paricarikkiṟavaṉukku vitai pata
kkum tirumañcaṉak kiṇaṟṟil tirumañcanamukka vitaipatakkum vaṭakkil nantava(ā)nam ciṟu ceṇpakamāka vitai patakkumāka vitai Irukalaṉe patakkāl vanta Iṟai puravu cittāyam Elavai U
kavai Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatuṅ koḷḷātomākavum canti(rāti)rātiṟcavaṟ celvatāka naṉtamāranār pāṟpeṭuttāka kuṭukka Itu panmāyecurarirakṣai §
Below this is the beginning of another inscription.
svastiśrī . virarācentira tevaṟku yāṇṭu patinmunṟāvatu karaivaḻi nāṭṭuc coḻamātevi nallūruṭaiyār kulaicekara ĪcuvaramuṭaiyāṟkuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.243Z by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
